materials.name: Aluminum (Kynar/PVDF or Tedlar coated)
materials.blurb: The waterfront choice — warrantied at any distance, including beachfront. Most brands require a twice-yearly fresh-water rinse near salt water.

provisions.note: Tedlar® aluminum: full coastal coverage, no setback. PVDF/FEVE aluminum: covered coastal at a reduced term (25/25/25 vs 25/40/30 yr).
No distance exclusion — warrantied on the beach. Condition: twice-yearly fresh-water rinse with records (AAMA 610).
Within ½ mile: covered at 25-yr (vs 35-yr) paint term + mandatory annual fresh-water rinse with records.
Aluminum-only coastal warranty (30 yr): within 1,500 ft requires twice-yearly fresh-water rinse (AAMA 609/610). Standard 35-yr warranty instead voids inside ½ mile.

materials.name: ZAM® / ZM-coated steel (PVDF/FEVE painted)
materials.blurb: Zinc-aluminum-magnesium coated steel — warrantied far closer to the water than regular Galvalume (mill warranty: only the last 300 ft to breaking surf is excluded).

provisions.note: 20.5-yr no-perforation warranty; excludes 'areas within 300 feet of the ocean coastline with breaking surf'. Requires ZM90+ coating, 24-ga min, PVDF/FEVE paint, twice-yearly fresh-water rinse. Not on pilings/over water.

Master warranty lists MagnaGuard steel as Non-Coastal only — no coverage within the 1,500 ft 'Coastal Area' (seacoast, salt or brackish water). Ask your rep for a Coastalume™-specific schedule (marketing cites 300 ft/0 ft but no warranty doc verifies it yet).

materials.name: Kynar/PVDF-painted steel (Galvalume / AZ50)
materials.blurb: Premium-painted steel — brand-dependent near salt water: void anywhere from 1,500 ft to a full ½ mile depending on manufacturer.

provisions.note: Void 'within 1500 ft of coastline with breaking surf, 800 ft from coastline with large bay, or 400 ft from marsh'. We apply the most protective 1,500 ft; bay/marsh-front homes may qualify closer — ask us.
Painted steel (AZ50/G90, PVDF/FEVE/SMP) has no Coastal Area coverage — void within 1,500 ft of seacoast, salt or brackish water.
'Englert does not offer any warranty for any period of time on prepainted Galvalume®' within ½ mile of seacoast, salt or brackish water.
Installations 'less than a one-half mile radius from a seacoast, saltwater or other brackish water environment are all excluded'.

materials.name: Standard / mill-finish Galvalume steel
materials.blurb: Conventional steel — the most restricted option near salt water; plan on at least a half-mile of separation.

provisions.note: No warranty for any period within ½ mile of seacoast, salt or brackish water (AZ55 25-yr / AZ50 20-yr beyond that).
Non-Coastal approval only — no coverage within the 1,500 ft Coastal Area.
Standard warranty excludes installations inside a ½-mile radius of salt or brackish water.
